name: Snap Inc
summary: Snap Inc. operates Snapchat, a camera and messaging application that enables users to communicate through photos, videos, and messages. The company generates substantially all revenue from advertising. Products include Snapchat's camera, messaging, Stories, Spotlight, Snap Map, and augmented reality features. Snap also develops Spectacles hardware. The platform serves a global community with a focus on visual communication and augmented reality experiences.

products.name: Snapchat
products.description: Camera and messaging application for visual communication via photos, videos, and messages.

products.name: Stories
products.description: Feature allowing users to share photo and video content viewable for 24 hours.

products.name: Spotlight
products.description: Short-form video content discovery feature within Snapchat.

products.name: Snap Map
products.description: Location-sharing and discovery feature within Snapchat.

products.name: Spectacles
products.description: Wearable camera glasses hardware product developed by Snap Inc.

products.name: Augmented Reality features
products.description: AR tools and lenses integrated into Snapchat for interactive visual experiences.

partnerships.description: Provides mobile operating system and cloud/infrastructure services for Snap's applications.
Provides mobile operating system services essential to Snapchat's platform functionality.
Provides cloud and other core services supporting Snap's applications and platform.
